title: EMI: Create Schematics
description: Add schematic items to EMI Favourites list
body:
![Image not loading? Open the details below!](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LIUKRAST/EmiCreateSchematics/1.20.x/util/emi_create_schematics_page.png)
<details>
<summary>Image Transcription</summary>
  Presenting EMI: Create Schematics!
  Don't waste time switching between create's clipboard and your inventory! Save items to favourites!
  A new button will happear in your clipboard's GUI... You just click and done! **It only works if the clipboard was generated by a schematicannon! You can try to do it manually via NBT, but in case it finds an error, the button will not happear!**
  And so... bam! Your items and item quantity has been saved to the EMI's favourite tab!
  Enjoy!
</details>
